surface_verification.justification: No web/CLI runtime surface affected — a CI CodeQL scan-config change plus byte-preserving Python refactors; verified by the unit suites and a compile-constant equivalence gate.

behaviors.behavior: CodeQL config excludes test fixtures via paths-ignore (**/tests/fixtures/**)
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_codeql_config_query_filters.py::test_paths_ignore_is_exactly_test_fixtures PASSED (RED before config edit, GREEN after)

behaviors.behavior: Six implicit string-concatenations refactored to explicit '+' with byte-identical resulting values
behaviors.evidence: compile-constant equivalence gate (co_consts before==after for all 4 files) + test_control_grade (19) / security report+degraded (48) / adopt data-preservation (1) / installer shell-scripts suites PASSED

behaviors.behavior: CodeQL CI analysis actually skips the fixtures so the ~1000 js/assignment-to-constant alerts auto-close
behaviors.reason: Runs in GitHub Actions CodeQL post-merge; the locally-assertable proxy (config contains the exclusion) is covered by the first behavior.
